events.title: Teddy Day
events.description: Teddy Day is the fourth day of Valentine's Week — a soft, cuddly celebration where stuffed teddy bears are gifted as tokens of affection, and the wholesome, playful side of love takes centre stage.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Teddy Day is Valentine's Week day 4 — genZScore 6-8. The energy is cute, playful, and wholesome — the most kawaii and soft-aesthetic day of the week. The GenZ crowd leans into the teddy bear reference literally and stylistically — plush textures, soft pastels, cute prints, teddy bear motifs, and cozy-cute silhouettes. Think soft-girl meets cottagecore meets Y2K cute. Colors are pastel and warm — baby pink, powder blue, lilac, soft beige, warm white, mint. Textures are key — fleece-feel, ribbed knits, soft cotton. Women in pastel co-ords, cute printed dresses, plush-texture tops, or a babydoll silhouette. Men in soft pastel hoodies, cute graphic tees with bear motifs, or a cozy sweatshirt. Jewellery is playful and cute — teddy bear pendants, cartoon-style pieces, small animal motifs. This is the most playful fashion day of Valentine's Week.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Teddy Day is the cutest fashion brief of Valentine's Week — lean all the way into soft, playful, and wholesome. Women in pastel oversized sweatshirts with mini skirts, babydoll dresses in powder blue or blush, or a cute ribbed co-ord in lavender or mint. The plush and fleece texture is the most on-brand fabric choice of the day — a teddy-texture jacket or a soft knit top is peak dressing. Men in pastel hoodies or sweatshirts with straight-fit jeans — soft and cute is the energy. Teddy bear motif jewellery is uniquely relevant today — small teddy pendants, bear-shaped earrings, cartoon-style bracelets. Character-based and cute printed pieces are highly shoppable. Pastel checks co-ords work beautifully. Small plush or soft-fabric bags complete the look. The overall energy is — soft, cuddly, and dressed like the teddy bear is a fashion reference.

app.headline: Soft Fits For Teddy Day. Cute.
lines: Pastel sweatshirts and plush textures — that's the brief.
Dress as soft as the teddy you're about to receive.
Cute fits, bear jewels, wholesome energy unlocked.

social_media.headline: Dressed Softer Than A Teddy.
lines: POV: showed up to Teddy Day in a lavender plush co-ord and became someone's comfort person.
Teddy Day fit check — pastels, soft textures, cartoon jewels, maximum cute.

events.title: Promise Day
events.description: Promise Day is the fifth day of Valentine's Week — a meaningful, heartfelt day where promises are made, commitments are deepened, and love is expressed through sincerity, trust, and the quiet strength of devotion.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Promise Day is Valentine's Week day 5 — genZScore 5-7. The energy shifts from cute and playful to sincere and meaningful. This is the most emotionally grounded day of Valentine's Week — less about glam, more about intention. The fashion mood is quietly elegant and understated — think clean lines, soft neutrals, and a put-together aesthetic that says 'I mean what I say.' The palette is refined and mature — soft whites, sage green, dusty blue, warm beige, soft lavender, muted rose. Not loud, not basic — intentionally calm. Women in clean minimal co-ords, simple midi dresses, or a well-fitted top with tailored trousers. Men in a clean button-down in soft blue or white with well-fitted trousers — the 'I made an effort without trying too hard' energy. Jewellery has meaning today — promise rings are the hero accessory, friendship bracelets, engraved pieces.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Promise Day calls for quiet intentionality in dressing — clean, considered, and meaningful. Women in a sage green midi dress, a soft white linen co-ord, or a powder blue top with well-fitted straight trousers. Nothing too loud, nothing too casual — the middle ground of 'I dressed for you.' Men in a clean white or soft blue button-down tucked into slim trousers — simple, sincere, and put-together. Promise rings and meaningful bracelets are the absolute hero accessories today — infinity symbols, alphabet pendants, engraved pieces, friendship bracelets. Layered delicate jewellery works beautifully — a thin chain, a simple ring, a dainty bracelet. Small structured bags or soft totes. Watches as a meaningful accessory for men. The overall energy is — dressed with quiet confidence and sincere intention.

app.headline: Dress With Intention Today.
lines: Promise Day calls for clean fits and meaningful jewels.
Soft whites, sage greens, and a ring that means something.
Quiet luxury for the most sincere day of the week.

social_media.headline: Meaningful Fits, Promise Day Energy.
lines: POV: wore a sage linen co-ord on Promise Day and said everything without words.
Promise Day fit check — clean lines, infinity bracelet, dressed like you mean it.

events.title: Hug Day
events.description: Hug Day is the sixth day of Valentine's Week — a warm, cozy celebration of closeness and comfort where the simple act of a hug speaks louder than words, bringing people together in the most heartwarming way.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Hug Day is Valentine's Week day 6 — genZScore 5-7. The energy is warm, cozy, and comforting — this is the most tactile day of the week. Fashion follows the hug metaphor literally — soft fabrics, cozy textures, warm tones, and silhouettes that feel like a warm embrace. Think oversized knits, fleece co-ords, soft hoodies, and warm layered textures. The palette is warm and enveloping — terracotta, warm beige, caramel, soft orange, dusty rose, warm cream. This is distinct from Teddy Day's kawaii-cute energy — Hug Day is warmer, more grown-up cozy. Women in oversized knit sweaters, soft co-ords, or a cozy wrap dress. Men in a soft oversized hoodie or a warm knit pullover with relaxed trousers. Jewellery is warm-toned and minimal — gold pieces, simple bracelets. The overall energy is — dressed like a hug feels.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Hug Day is the cozy fashion brief of Valentine's Week — dress like comfort is the whole point. Women in an oversized terracotta knit sweater with straight-fit jeans, a soft ribbed co-ord in warm beige, or a cozy wrap dress in dusty rose. The texture story is everything today — ribbed knits, fleece co-ords, and plush-feel fabrics are the most on-brand catalog categories. Men in a warm oversized hoodie or a chunky knit pullover in rust or caramel with relaxed trousers — the kind of outfit that invites a hug. Gold-tone jewellery in warm minimal pieces — a simple chain, a small hoop, a delicate bracelet. Crossbody or tote bags in warm brown tones. The overall energy is — wrapped up in warmth, dressed like someone you want to hold onto.

app.headline: Fits That Feel Like A Hug.
lines: Cozy knits and warm tones — Hug Day sorted.
Terracotta, rust, caramel — the warmest palette of the week.
Dress soft enough to make someone want to stay.

social_media.headline: Outfit Giving Warm Hug Energy.
lines: POV: wore an oversized terracotta knit on Hug Day and became everyone's safe space.
Hug Day fit check — cozy textures, warm tones, dressed like a warm embrace.

events.title: Kiss Day
events.description: Kiss Day is the seventh day of Valentine's Week — the most intimate and charged day before Valentine's Day itself, where the air is electric with anticipation, romance is at its peak, and every moment feels like the one before a perfect ending.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Kiss Day is Valentine's Week day 7 — genZScore 7-8. This is the most charged and intimate day of the week — the night before Valentine's Day. Fashion energy peaks here — this is the most dressed-up, most intentional, most seductive styling moment of the entire week. The mood is bold romantic — confident, magnetic, and intentional. Think rich reds, deep burgundy, black with red accents, deep plum, and sultry jewel tones. Women in confident silhouettes — wrap dresses, satin minis, bold red co-ords, off-shoulder or one-shoulder pieces. Men in a sleek dark shirt or a bold red-accented outfit — the most put-together they've been all week. Jewellery is statement and romantic — bold red stone pieces, dark gem accents, confident chunky pieces. The overall energy is — the most magnetic version of yourself, dressed for the most electric moment of the week.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Kiss Day is the most charged fashion moment of Valentine's Week — dress like the main character of a romance film. Women in a deep red wrap dress or a satin mini in burgundy or wine, a bold one-shoulder co-ord, or a sleek black dress with red accessories. The off-shoulder and sweetheart necklines are the most on-brand silhouettes of the day. Men in a deep burgundy or bold red shirt with slim dark trousers — clean, intentional, magnetic. Red is the undisputed color of the day — but deep wine, plum, and black-with-red accents are the GenZ elevation of the classic. Statement jewellery with red stone or crystal accents, bold earrings, a confident ring. Small sleek bags or clutches. The overall energy is — the most electric version of your romantic self, dressed for the most anticipated moment of the week.

app.headline: Dressed For The Most Electric Moment.
lines: Deep red, bold cuts, and a whole lot of intention.
Kiss Day calls for your most magnetic outfit yet.
Satin, wine tones, statement jewels — the brief is clear.

social_media.headline: Red Fit. Kiss Day. Say Less.
lines: POV: walked into Kiss Day in a deep wine satin dress and the whole room felt it.
Kiss Day fit check — bold red, sweetheart neckline, dressed like the finale scene.

events.title: Valentine's Day
events.description: Valentine's Day is the ultimate celebration of love — a day for couples, situationships, self-love, and every shade of romance in between, marked by special dates, heartfelt gestures, and the most dressed-up Tuesday of the year.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Valentine's Day is the grand finale of Valentine's Week — genZScore 7-8. This is THE most dressed-up romantic day of the year. The crowd spans everyone — couples on dinner dates, friend groups celebrating Galentine's, solo self-love dressers, and everything in between. The fashion energy is the highest it's been all week — elevated, intentional, and deeply personal. The GenZ approach to Valentine's dressing has evolved — it's no longer just red and pink. It now includes self-love dressing, Galentine's group fits, and the situationship aesthetic. Three distinct styling modes: (1) romantic dinner date — elevated, sultry, intentional; (2) Galentine's with friends — fun, colorful, celebratory; (3) self-love solo — confident, personal, expressive. Red and pink remain dominant but the full romantic palette is in play — burgundy, champagne, blush, deep plum, white. Jewellery is the most elevated of the week — statement pieces, meaningful accessories. This is the fashion culmination of a week of building energy.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Valentine's Day is the fashion culmination of a week of building romantic energy — three distinct dressing modes all apply. For the romantic dinner date: a satin midi dress in deep red or champagne, a sleek burgundy co-ord, or an elegant jumpsuit — elevated, intentional, magnetic. For Galentine's with friends: fun pink and red printed co-ords, colorful mini dresses, matching friend group aesthetics — celebratory and expressive. For self-love solo dressing: confident, personal, expressive — wear the red dress for yourself. Men in their most intentional outfit of the week — a deep burgundy or crisp white shirt with slim trousers, a sleek watch, and a small meaningful accessory. Jewellery is the most elevated of the week — heart pendants, solitaire rings, statement earrings, delicate layered pieces. Small structured bags or embellished clutches for women. The red dress remains the icon of the day — but champagne, blush, and deep burgundy are the GenZ elevation. This is the outfit that gets remembered.

app.headline: Valentine's Day. Your Best Fit Yet.
lines: Red dress, champagne satin, or a bold pink co-ord — all correct.
Galentine's, date night, or solo — we dressed every version.
The most romantic outfit of the year is one tap away.

social_media.headline: Valentine's Fit. No Explaining Needed.
lines: POV: Valentine's Day outfit so good you stopped waiting for someone to notice.
Red dress era, champagne satin era, self-love era — pick yours, we have all three.

events.title: Maha Shivaratri
events.description: Maha Shivaratri is one of Hinduism's most sacred nights — a vigil of devotion dedicated to Lord Shiva, marked by fasting, night-long prayers, abhishekam rituals, temple visits, and a deeply spiritual atmosphere across the country.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Maha Shivaratri is one of the most sacred Hindu festivals — genZScore 1-3. It is primarily a night-long religious observance — temple visits, fasting, prayers, and abhishekam. The crowd spans all ages with a strong family and devotional focus. Fashion is deeply rooted in tradition and devotion — white and grey are the most auspicious colors for Shiva worship, along with saffron, rudraksha-inspired accessories, and ash-toned neutrals. Women in white or off-white sarees, salwar suits, or ethnic sets — minimal embellishment, clean and pure. Men in white or off-white dhoti-kurta or kurta-pyjama. Rudraksha jewellery is uniquely iconic for this festival — malas, bracelets, pendants. The overall aesthetic is pure, minimal, and deeply spiritual — no western, no loud colors, no embellishments.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Maha Shivaratri is the purest, most minimal ethnic fashion moment in the calendar — white is the only brief. Women in crisp white or off-white cotton sarees with minimal silver or grey borders, or a clean white salwar suit with chikankari embroidery. Men in white dhoti-kurta or a simple white kurta-pyjama — pure, clean, devotional. Grey and ash tones are a beautiful secondary palette for Shiva worship. Rudraksha jewellery is uniquely iconic today — rudraksha bead bracelets, malas, and pendants are the most spiritually relevant accessories in the catalog. Silver-tone jewellery complements the white palette far better than gold. Trishul and Om motif accessories are highly relevant. Minimal embellishment — chikankari and subtle self-weave patterns are the maximum appropriate detailing. The overall energy is pure, calm, and deeply reverent — dressed for devotion, not display.

app.headline: Dressed In White For Shiva's Night.
lines: Pure whites, rudraksha beads, and deep devotion.
Maha Shivaratri calls for your most serene ethnic look.
White saree or white kurta — both are offerings tonight.

social_media.headline: White Fits For The Sacred Night.
lines: POV: showed up to Shivaratri in a white chikankari saree and the temple glowed brighter.
Maha Shivaratri fit check — all white, rudraksha on, spirits high.

events.title: Cry-It-Out Day
events.genres: Social, Wellness, Pop Culture, Gen Z Cultural Moment
events.description: Cry-It-Out Day falls perfectly the day after Valentine's Day — a Gen Z-ordained emotional release day for processing feelings, embracing the post-Valentine's comedown, and making crying look inexplicably aesthetic.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Cry-It-Out Day is a pure Gen Z cultural invention — genZScore 8-9. It falls the day after Valentine's Day which makes it even more loaded — post-date highs, post-date lows, situationship fallout, or just a good cathartic cry for no reason. The fashion energy is deeply specific to this Gen Z moment — the aesthetic cry. Think sad-girl-aesthetic, melancholic pinterest boards, dark academia lite, and the kind of outfit you wear when you want to look good while feeling everything. The palette is moody and introspective — deep blues, grey, charcoal, muted lavender, dusty rose, black, midnight tones. Silhouettes are soft and enveloping — oversized, cozy, draped. This is NOT messy crying — this is cinematic crying. Women in oversized vintage-inspired pieces, soft grey co-ords, or a moody blue knit dress. Men in oversized hoodies, dark neutral fits. Jewellery is minimal and meaningful — a delicate chain, a ring that means something.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Cry-It-Out Day has a very specific Gen Z aesthetic — the cinematic cry, not the messy one. The outfit must look good while feeling everything. Women in an oversized charcoal grey or navy hoodie with straight-fit jeans, a moody blue knit dress, or a soft grey ribbed co-ord — effortlessly melancholic. Men in an oversized dark hoodie or a washed-out navy sweatshirt with relaxed trousers — the universal sad-boy uniform. The key is cozy-but-considered — this is not actual loungewear, it's elevated emotional dressing. Minimal meaningful jewellery — a delicate chain, a ring that means something, a small locket. Dark academia-adjacent accessories work beautifully — small structured bags in dark tones, wire-framed glasses implied. The post-Valentine's timing means dusty rose and muted lavender as a callback to the week that just ended. The overall energy is — looking inexplicably good while processing everything.

app.headline: Cry Cute. It's Literally A Holiday.
lines: Moody fits for your most cinematic emotional moment.
Grey hoodie, navy knit, meaningful ring — cry kit sorted.
Post-Valentine's feelings hit different in the right outfit.

social_media.headline: Crying Aesthetically Since Feb 15th.
lines: POV: it's Cry-It-Out Day and your charcoal grey fit is doing all the emotional heavy lifting.

events.title: Anuv Jain Concert
events.genres: Music, Live Concert, Indie, Folk, Romantic
events.description: Anuv Jain brings his Dastakhat India Tour to life — an intimate evening of soulful indie-folk music, poetry-in-melody, and the kind of heartfelt storytelling that makes his songs feel like personal letters written just for you.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Anuv Jain is India's most beloved indie-folk artist — genZScore 6-7. His audience is deeply emotional, aesthetically aware, and chronically Pinterest-brained GenZ. The Dastakhat tour name itself evokes handwritten letters and intimate signatures — the fashion must match that energy. This is a soft, intimate indoor concert — not a high-energy rave or a Bollywood night. The aesthetic sits at the intersection of cottagecore, dark academia lite, and soft indie. Think warm earth tones, vintage-inspired prints, linen textures, corduroy, soft knits, and poetry-book aesthetics. Colors are warm and muted — caramel, burnt orange, sage, dusty rose, warm beige, olive, cream, soft browns. Women in flowy midi skirts, vintage-inspired dresses, linen co-ords, or a soft knit top with wide-leg trousers. Men in well-fitted linen shirts, corduroy trousers, or a warm toned knit. Jewellery is delicate, meaningful, and artisanal. This crowd dresses like they underline passages in books.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Anuv Jain concert is the indie-folk Pinterest board come to life — dress like you wrote your feelings in a journal this morning. Women in a flowy floral midi skirt with a tucked linen top, a vintage-inspired dress in caramel or dusty rose, or a sage green co-ord with delicate earrings. Men in a well-fitted linen shirt in olive, rust, or warm beige — half tucked, sleeves rolled — with straight-fit corduroy or linen trousers. The textures are as important as the colors here — linen, cotton, soft knits, and corduroy all feel right. Layering with a light jacket or overshirt adds to the intimate concert energy. Jewellery is artisanal and delicate — thin gold chains, small hoop earrings, a dainty ring or two, a meaningful bracelet. Tote bags or small leather-look crossbody bags. Vintage-inspired glasses. The overall energy is — effortlessly poetic, warm, and dressed like every Anuv Jain song feels.

app.headline: Dastakhat Tour Needs A Poetic Fit.
lines: Linen, earth tones, and feels — your Anuv Jain uniform.
Dress like his songs feel — warm, soft, and intentional.
Concert fits that hit as deep as Baarishein does.

social_media.headline: Dressed Like An Anuv Jain Song.
lines: POV: wore a caramel linen co-ord to Dastakhat and the whole concert felt like a journal entry.
Anuv Jain fit check — earth tones, dainty jewels, dressed like a feeling not a person.

events.title: Hanumankind Live
events.genres: Music, Live Concert, Hip-Hop, Rap, Desi Hip-Hop
events.description: Hanumankind brings his explosive desi hip-hop energy live — a high-octane night of hard-hitting rap, genre-defying beats, and the raw cultural swagger that made Big Dawgs a global anthem.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Hanumankind is the biggest desi hip-hop moment in India right now — genZScore 9-10. Big Dawgs went globally viral, collaborations with Kalmi, and a sound that merges Kerala roots with global hip-hop. The crowd is hypebeast GenZ, streetwear-obsessed, culturally proud, and maximally online. This is THE fashion event for India's streetwear scene. Think oversized everything, cargo fits, desi streetwear fusion — lungi-inspired silhouettes, graphic tees with Indian motifs, bold sneaker culture implied, chains, bucket hats, bandanas. Colors are bold — black, white, earth tones with neon pops. The desi-swag fusion angle is critical here — this isn't just western streetwear, it's Indian streetwear with cultural references. Bengaluru crowd will go absolutely unhinged with fits. Jewellery is chunky and statement — chains, rings, ear studs. This is the highest GenZ fashion intensity event possible.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Hanumankind live is India's biggest desi streetwear fashion moment — dress like Big Dawgs is your personal anthem. The signature look is oversized graphic tees or hoodies with cargo pants or wide-leg trousers. Desi fusion is critical — lungi-inspired wrap silhouettes, Indian motif graphic prints, Kerala-meets-streetwear references will go viral in this crowd. Women in oversized fits, boxy co-ords, or a crop hoodie with cargo pants. Men in layered oversized fits — a hoodie under an open overshirt with cargos. Chunky chain necklaces, stacked rings, ear studs are must-have accessories. Caps — bucket hats, snapbacks — are essential. Bandanas as accessories work strongly. Crossbody and sling bags only. Distressed denim as a base is always right. The Bengaluru crowd will attempt desi-streetwear fusion looks — reward that instinct with the right catalog matches. This is an unhinged fashion moment — lean all the way in.

app.headline: Big Dawgs Energy, Bigger Fit.
lines: Desi streetwear szn is officially here.
Cargo fits, chain stacked, cap on — Hanumankind ready.
Your most unhinged outfit is the correct outfit tonight.

social_media.headline: Big Dawgs Don't Dress Basic.
lines: POV: walked into Hanumankind live in a desi streetwear fit and the crowd went feral.
Fit brief — oversized, cargo, chained up, zero corporate energy. That's it.

events.title: Rose Day
events.description: Rose Day kicks off Valentine's Week — a day of gifting roses, expressing feelings, and embracing the romantic energy that takes over college campuses, cafes, and city streets in the lead-up to Valentine's Day.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Rose Day is the opening act of Valentine's Week — genZScore 6-8. The crowd is GenZ college students and young adults — romantic, social-media-native, dressing for the 'gram and for their person. The energy is soft-romantic but with GenZ edge — not saccharine, not bridal, just effortlessly cute. Red and pink are the obvious palette but the GenZ crowd elevates it — dusty rose, deep red, blush, burgundy over basic red. The soft-girl aesthetic is dominant for women — flowy silhouettes, floral prints, satin textures, dainty jewellery. Men lean into smart casual with a romantic color nod — burgundy shirts, deep red accents, clean fits. This is a daytime campus and cafe event primarily — comfortable yet styled. Jewellery is delicate and romantic — hearts, dainty chains, small florals.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Rose Day is the soft-romantic era starter pack. Women in flowy floral mini dresses, satin slip skirts with a white top, or a dusty rose co-ord. The sweetheart neckline is the most on-brand silhouette of the day. Men in a clean burgundy or deep red shirt with slim trousers — simple but intentional. The GenZ couple aesthetic is coordinated but not matchy-matchy — complementary tones. Dainty jewellery is everything — heart pendants, tiny hoop earrings, a delicate ring stack, small flower studs. Small crossbody bags in blush or white. Red and pink don't have to be loud — dusty rose and deep burgundy feel more GenZ and less Valentine's Day card. Floral prints are the most shoppable pattern of the week. The overall energy is — I dressed up for someone but made it look effortless.

app.headline: Rose Day Fit, Petal Perfect.
lines: Dusty rose or deep red — both are the right answer.
Dainty jewels, flowy fits, soft-girl era activated.
Dress like someone's about to give you roses.

social_media.headline: Soft Girl Era Starts Today.
lines: POV: showed up to Rose Day in a satin slip dress and heart earrings — mission complete.
Red is for amateurs. Dusty rose and burgundy are for the ones with taste.

events.title: ICC Cricket T20 WC Begins
events.description: The ICC Men's T20 World Cup begins — the biggest stage in shortest format cricket, bringing together the world's top teams for a high-octane tournament of power hitting, fierce rivalries, and unforgettable moments.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: ICC T20 World Cup is a massive national moment — genZScore 6-8. Cricket in India is religion and fashion follows. The crowd watching at stadiums, fan parks, and screening events spans all ages but GenZ drives the fashion energy. Two distinct styling moments: (1) stadium/screening watch parties — jersey culture, team colors, face paint, fan accessories; (2) casual at-home or cafe watching — comfortable but team-spirited. India blue is the dominant color — navy and sky blue. But the T20 format attracts a younger, more energetic crowd who style their fandom creatively. Cricket jerseys styled as fashion pieces — over a longline tee, with cargos or joggers. Caps are essential. Jewellery is minimal and sporty. The GenZ cricket fan dresses like they're both watching AND ready to play.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Cricket World Cup fashion is jersey culture elevated. The India blue jersey is the hero piece — style it as a fashion statement, not just sportswear. Men in the India jersey over a white longline tee with navy joggers or cargos — that's the GenZ cricket fan uniform. Women in a cropped jersey or an India-blue co-ord with white sneakers implied. Caps are non-negotiable — India cricket caps or a solid navy cap. Color-blocking in India's team colors — navy, sky blue, and orange — is a strong styling direction. Kids cricket jerseys and tees are highly relevant — family watch parties are a big moment. Watches with sporty straps work well. Minimal jewellery — a simple bracelet or ring is enough. The overall energy is sporty-casual with maximum team pride — comfort is key because the match goes long.

app.headline: T20 WC Begins. Dress Blue.
lines: Jersey out, cap on, India mode activated.
Stadium fits or watch party fits — we have both.
Cheer louder when your outfit is this good.

social_media.headline: India Blue Is The Only Fit.
lines: POV: styled your India jersey like a fashion piece and won the match before it started.
T20 WC dress code — navy, caps, zero formal energy. Let's go.

events.title: Propose Day
events.description: Propose Day is the second day of Valentine's Week — when hearts go on record, feelings get confessed, and the most nerve-wracking yet romantic moments of the year play out across campuses, cafes, and city corners.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Propose Day is Valentine's Week day 2 — genZScore 6-8. This is a step up from Rose Day in romantic intensity. The crowd is GenZ and young millennials — dressing with intention because today is THE day for a lot of people. The fashion energy elevates slightly from Rose Day — more put-together, more considered, more 'I want to look good when this moment happens.' Two styling modes: (1) the one proposing — confident, dressed up, intentional; (2) the one receiving — effortlessly romantic. The palette deepens slightly from Rose Day — rich reds, deep burgundy, blush, champagne, cream. Women in elevated romantic silhouettes — midi dresses, satin pieces, soft co-ords. Men in smart casual with romantic color intent — a well-fitted shirt in deep red, burgundy or cream. Jewellery is dainty and meaningful — rings are obviously the hero accessory of the day.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Propose Day is the most intentionally dressed day of Valentine's Week — every outfit is chosen with a specific moment in mind. Women in elevated romantic pieces — a satin midi dress in champagne or deep red, a lace-detail top with wide-leg trousers, or a soft floral co-ord. Men in a well-fitted button-down in burgundy, cream, or deep red — tucked in, sleeves slightly rolled, looking like they mean it. Rings are the absolute hero accessory today — stack them, layer them, make them the focal point. Dainty necklaces with heart or solitaire pendants are highly relevant. Small structured bags or clutches for women. A watch for men that says 'I made an effort.' The overall energy is — quietly confident, romantically intentional, dressed like the answer is going to be yes.

app.headline: Dress Like The Answer Is Yes.
lines: Today's fit needs to be as bold as your feelings.
Rings, satin, and a whole lot of intention.
Propose Day outfit? We made it easy for you.

social_media.headline: Said Yes To This Outfit First.
lines: POV: wore a champagne satin dress on Propose Day and made the whole moment cinematic.
Propose Day fit check — deep red shirt, dainty ring, confident energy. Go.

events.title: DJ Snake Concert
events.genres: Music, Live Concert, EDM, Electronic, Dance
events.description: DJ Snake brings his globally iconic EDM and electronic set to India — a high-voltage night of chart-topping bangers, bass drops, and an electric crowd united by Taki Taki, Lean On, and a relentless dancefloor energy.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: DJ Snake is a massive global EDM act — genZScore 9-10. This is peak rave-meets-festival fashion territory. The crowd is hypebeast GenZ, club-ready, and fully unhinged with their fits. EDM concert rules apply — neon, shimmer, sequins, color-block, crop lengths, cut-outs, metallics. It's a night event so dark base colors with neon and metallic accents dominate. The Bengaluru crowd at an EDM concert goes maximally experimental — fishnet layers, holographic pieces, LED-inspired color choices. Women in sequin co-ords, metallic mini dresses, cut-out tops, neon sets. Men in color-blocked streetwear, graphic tees, cargo shorts, or a bold printed shirt. Jewellery is statement and maximalist — chunky pieces, hoops, ear cuffs. This is the single highest-energy fashion moment in the calendar — no basic fits survive.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: DJ Snake concert is the ultimate EDM fashion moment — dress like the bass drop is your cue to walk in. Women in sequin mini dresses, metallic co-ords, cut-out tops with neon skirts, or a shimmer halter with cargo pants — anything that catches light on the dancefloor. Men in color-blocked oversized tees with cargo shorts, bold printed shirts open over a graphic tee, or a sleek all-black set with neon accessories. Neon is the accent color of the night — even one neon piece elevates the whole look. Sequins and shimmer fabrics are the most relevant catalog categories for this event. Chunky jewellery — large hoops, ear cuffs, layered chains, stacked rings. Holographic or metallic mini bags. Caps and bucket hats work for men. The Bengaluru crowd will go full unhinged — fishnet layers, LED-inspired accessories, glitter. Match that energy in the catalog recommendations.

app.headline: Bass Drop. Sequins Out. Go.
lines: DJ Snake night calls for your most unhinged fit.
Neon, shimmer, cut-outs — dancefloor dress code sorted.
Wear something that catches light at every drop.

social_media.headline: Taki Taki But Make It Fashion.
lines: POV: walked into DJ Snake in a sequin co-ord and the crowd parted like a music video.
EDM concert fit check — metallics, neon accents, zero basic energy. Drop incoming.

events.title: Chocolate Day
events.description: Chocolate Day is the third day of Valentine's Week — a sweet, indulgent celebration of love where chocolates are exchanged, cafe dates are planned, and the warmth of affection is shared in the most delicious way possible.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Chocolate Day is Valentine's Week day 3 — genZScore 6-7. The energy is warm, cozy, and indulgent — think a cute cafe date or a campus hangout with your person. The fashion mood is softer and more casual than Propose Day — less pressure, more warmth. The color palette is directly inspired by chocolate — rich browns, caramels, toffee, mocha, warm beiges, cream, and deep cocoa tones. This is actually a very GenZ fashion direction — the brown-and-cream aesthetic has been massively trending. Women in warm brown co-ords, caramel knit tops, mocha midi skirts, or a chocolate-tone dress. Men in warm brown or caramel shirts, cream trousers, or a cozy knit in toffee tones. Jewellery is warm-toned — gold, amber, earthy pieces. The overall energy is cozy-chic, warm-romantic, and aesthetically cohesive.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Chocolate Day is the brown-aesthetic moment of Valentine's Week — and it's genuinely one of the most on-trend GenZ color palettes right now. Women in a caramel ribbed co-ord, a mocha satin midi skirt with a cream top, or a warm brown a-line dress with dainty gold jewellery. Men in a toffee or tan shirt with cream or off-white trousers — clean, warm, and effortlessly put-together. The knit texture works beautifully here — a chocolate brown knit top is peak Chocolate Day dressing. Gold-tone jewellery complements the warm palette perfectly — small hoop earrings, a dainty chain, a simple ring. Crossbody bags in brown or tan leather-look are very relevant. The overall energy is warm cafe date — cozy enough for a coffee shop, cute enough for a cute moment.

app.headline: Brown Aesthetic. Chocolate Day. Perfect.
lines: Caramel fits and mocha tones — the most delicious palette.
Dress like the date is at a cute cafe. Because it is.
Warm browns, gold jewels, and cozy fits await.

social_media.headline: Dressed In Chocolate Tones Today.
lines: POV: showed up to Chocolate Day in a caramel co-ord and became the aesthetic.
Brown outfit on Chocolate Day — intentional, on-trend, and yes we planned this.
